sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2222" key="*ai)guptiw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Αἰγυπτιώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n2222.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Egyptian-like</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0435.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.Jun.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
